vandorens-white-bread.name: Vandoren's White Bread
instructions: In a large bowl, combine warm water, yeast, salt, oil, sugar, and 4 cups flour. Mix thoroughly, and let sponge rise until doubled in size.
Gradually add about 4 cups flour, kneading until smooth. Place dough in a greased bowl, and turn several times to coat. Cover with a damp cloth. Allow to rise until doubled.
Punch down the dough, let it rest a few minutes. Divide dough into three equal parts. Shape into loaves, and place in three 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 inch greased bread pans. Let rise until almost doubled.
Bake at 177°C (175 degrees C) for 35 to 45 minutes. The loaves may need to be covered for the last few minutes with foil to prevent excess browning.

vanilla-heart-cakes-with-rosewater-icing.name: Vanilla Heart Cakes With Rosewater Icing

ingredients.item: X quantity one-bowl vanilla cake batter

instructions: Preheat oven to 160°C (163°C). Lightly grease a 20cmx30cm cake tin and line with non-stick baking paper. Spread the cake batter into the tin and bake for 35–40 minutes or until cooked when tested with a skewer. Allow to cool in the tin for 5 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack to cool completely. Place the sugar, rosewater and water in a large bowl and whisk until smooth. Use an 8cm heart-shaped cookie cutter to cut hearts from the cake. Spoon over the icing and top with petals. Refrigerate until just set.

vanilla-syrup.name: Vanilla Syrup
instructions: Microwave vanilla bean and 2 teaspoons water in a small microwave-safe bowl until softened, about 30 seconds.
Bring sugar and remaining water to a boil in a saucepan.
Split vanilla bean lengthwise on a work surface; scrape out seeds with the back of a knife.
Add seeds and pod to saucepan; boil until syrup is thickened slightly, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.

vegan-brownie-lezzet.name: Vegan Brownie

ingredients.item: 1 cup flour (full wheat or classic white flour)
Semi-water glass flesh milk (badem, oats, peel etc. Home
1/3 cup olive oil or coconut oil
1/4 cup vegan dark drop chocolate or chocolate

instructions: 1. Mix water with flax seeds in a bowl, wait for 5 minutes.
2. Mix flour, cocoa, salt, baking powder and sugar in a bowl.
3. Mix Arms in a separate container;t, olive oil, vanilla extract and gel flax eggs.
4. Add wet mixture to dry materials.
5. Mix until a homogeneous consistency area.
6. Add the latest drop rates, styrene with spatula.
7. Spread the mixture from caliba, it pushes neutralizes.
8. You can sprinkle extra chocolate if you wish.
9. Configure oven to 175 degrees.
10. Hydrophilic a square oven container or cool cooking paper.
11. 11. Bake 20–25 minutes in the oven and then leave to cool until the room temperature comes.
12. After cooling, slice and serve.

vegan-hawaiian-pizza-recipe-comedera.name: Vegan Hawaiian Pizza Recipe
vegan-hawaiian-pizza-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil de pizza hawaiana vegana

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de harina de trigo integral
2 tazas de pasta de tomate vegana
1 cup of fresh pineapple (cut into small pieces)
1 cup of Vegan ham with thin cuts ((optional))
1/2 taza de pimiento rojo  (cortado en tiras)

instructions: We started this recipe by preparing the mass. In a small bowl, mix with warm water and sugar. Let rest till the mixture bubbles.
In a big bowl, it combines flour and salt. Add the yeast mix and olive oil. Fold the dough onto a pitted surface for about 10 minutes, or till soft and elastic.
It puts the dough into a padded bowl, cover with a moist cloth and leave to stand at a warm place for 1 hour, or until its size has been doubled.
It purifies the oven at 220-3 and stretches the dough onto a pitted plate and evenly spreads the tomato sauce.
Redistribute the Vegan ham, if you have decided to use it, pineapple, pineapple, onion, spinach and mushrooms onto the dough.
Espolvorea generosamente el queso vegano rallado.
Hornea for 15-20 minutes or till the dough is golden and the cheese melted. Once ready, remove from the oven and let rest about 5 minutes before cutting and serving.

vegan-mexican-casserole.name: Vegan Mexican Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Combine onion and garlic in a skillet over medium-high heat. Saute until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add chorizo, black beans, tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, jalapeno peppers, and green chiles. Cook until bubbling, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir in taco seasoning and cilantro and remove from heat.

Spread 1 cup of the chorizo mixture on the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking pan. Add 2 tortillas to cover. Add half the remaining chorizo mixture and top with vegan Cheddar cheese. Add remaining tortilla shells and remaining chorizo mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling hot, about 30 minutes.

vegan-potato-soy-chorizo-tacos.name: Vegan Potato Soy Chorizo Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Cook, covered, until potatoes are easily pierced with a knife, about 30 minutes. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking water.
Transfer boiled potatoes to a bowl and season with salt and pepper. Mash with a potato masher, adding reserved cooking water to reach desired consistency.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet. Cook soy chorizo for 5 minutes. Add mashed potatoes and mix well.

Heat tortillas on a hot griddle over medium heat to soften them. Fill them with equal amounts of potato-chorizo mixture. Fold them in half and brush the outside of the tortillas with the remaining 1 tablespoon oil. Place tacos on the hot griddle and cook, turning once, until crisp, 3 to 5 minutes.

vegan-sweet-potato-bread.name: Vegan Sweet Potato Bread
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Add sweet potatoes and cook until tender, 20 to 30 minutes; drain. Place sweet potatoes in a bowl and mash with a potato masher until smooth.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.

Stir sugar and oil together in a bowl until well mixed; beat in banana. Combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and baking powder in a separate bowl. Alternate stirring the flour mixture and 1/3 cup water into the sugar mixture until combined. Mix in sweet potatoes and pecans; stir until batter is smooth. Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is golden brown, about 1 hour.

vegan-textured-soy-burger-pequerecetas.name: Vegan Textured Soy Burger

ingredients.item: 1/4 de cucharadita de pimienta negra molida
2 tazas de lombarda (col roja) en juliana
1/2 cucharadita de pimienta negra en grano

instructions: It starts by moisturizing textured soybean. Fold 120 grams of hot water onto 100 grams of texturized soya and leave to stand for 10-15 minutes until soft and absorbed water. Let them rest for 10-15 minutes till the soybean's soft and absorbed water. Drain well textured soya using a pallet and press to remove excess water.

In a large frying pan, heats olive oil with medium heat. Add chopped onion and garlic and paddle till golden. Add the textured soybean and scattering for a few minutes. He then adds the powder cumin, smoked pimenton, salt and black pepper. Cooking for another 5 minutes till flavors blend.
Retract the mixture from the fire and let some cool. Then add the bread and mix till all ingredients are well combined.

We get mass portions with our hands and we form the burgers, or we use a press to make burgers so we have uniforms (you can buy them here). We heated up a frying pan with an oil chorrit and fry soya burgers from both sides till they are golden.

In a saucer, it combines apple vinegar, water, sugar, salt, mustard seeds, dill seeds (if you are using them) and black peppermint. Take the mixture to boiling. Add the Jolian Lombard to the rinse mix and stir well. It reduces fire and cooks with low heat for 10-15 minutes until the Lombard's tender but still crispy. Remove the tanned lombard from the fire and let cool before using it in the cheeseburger.

Tight slightly the vegan cheeseburger's loaves in a grill or frying pan. Put a textured soybean burger at the bottom of each bread. It adds cucumbers and rucula to its taste. Add a generous portion of lombard cabbage. If you wish, add Vegan mustard and vegan ketchup to suit. Cover with top of bread and serve immediately.

vegetable-burgers-argiro.name: Vegetable Burgers
instructions: Place the lentils, carrot, onion and potatoes in a pot and cover them with water.
Boil for 25 minutes until soft.
Drain the ingredients in a colander and transfer them to a large bowl.
Add bread, corn flakes, parsley, dill, grated carrot, curry, cumin, salt and pepper.
Ferment the mixture well until all materials are combined.
We make four vegetable burgers.
In a small baking pan, add non-stick paper, rub with some olive oil and place the burgers.
Bake in a preheated oven at 200

vegetable-burgers-with-cheese-in-the-ove.name: Vegetable Burgers With Cheese In The Oven
vegetable-burgers-with-cheese-in-the-ove.original_name: Μπιφτέκια λαχανικών με τυρί στο φούρνο

ingredients.item: 2-3 slices of stale bread in crumbs
2-3 slices of stale bread in crumbs

instructions: Clean and cut the broccoli in small pieces.
Wash and boil for 4-5 minutes in boiling water. Then strain and leave it under running tap water to cool. Drain it very well and touch it on absorbent paper to dry. We chop it with a knife.
Clean the pepper, chop it in the blender and add it to a bowl.
Add the chopped broccoli, carrot, zucchini, bread crumbs, eggs, grated cheeses and, if we want, some pepper and knead very well.
If the mixture is soft and not molded, add a few bread crumbs or oats flakes until stabilised.
We make long, tight burgers and touch them on a baking pan lined with non-stick paper.
Add a brush to the surface and make them in a preheated evening at 200°C, on the medium grill, for 15 minutes, until golden.
Carefully flip them with spatula and bake them for 10 minutes, until golden on the other side.
Let the vegetable burgers stand a little and serve.

vegetable-lasagna-recipe-comedera.name: Vegetable Lasagna Recipe

ingredients.item: 9 lasagna sheets (advanced or special for oven)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Coloca las verduras en una bandeja para horno forrado con papel de cera. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto, el tomillo y aceite de oliva al gusto.
It leads to an oven at 200-3 and cooks for about 15-20 minutes till they are caramelized.
Retira del horno y reserva.
To make the salsa, add to the mixer the basil leaves, garlic teeth, lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper to suit.
Procesa hasta obtener una salsa bien cremosa.
Warm the lasagna with a first layer of avocado cream. It puts a cape of sheets and another of the salsa.
Esparce la verdura de manera uniforme, y el queso mozzarella.
Repeat this process by two more layers to complete the plate and finish with parmesan cheese broken.
Wet the lasagna for about 30 minutes at 180 ″ 3 ″ or till well cooked.
Let them rest, cover with more cheese and enjoy.

velveeta-spicy-sausage-dip.name: Velveeta Spicy Sausage Dip

ingredients.item: Ro*tel diced tomatoes and green chilies

instructions: Mix Velveeta, tomatoes, and cooked pork sausage together in a microwave-safe bowl.
Microwave on high for 3 minutes. Stir, and microwave until Velveeta is completely melted, about 2 more minutes.
